message:
type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: My feature (path_transform for loaders) only touches src/jinja2/loaders.py. Please confirm your files are disjoint from this.

type: PROPOSE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Implementing fallback_searchpath param for FileSystemLoader (get_source/list_templates changes in loaders.py). What file(s) does your feature touch?

type: REVISE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Both our features touch loaders.py (mine: path_transform param + apply in get_source across all loader classes; yours: fallback_searchpath for FileSystemLoader). File can't be made disjoint. Let's both proceed, keep changes minimal/localized to our own params, and rely on git merge afterward per protocol to combine. I'll add path_transform as an __init__ kwarg on each loader (BaseLoader.get_source callers use it) - shouldn't conflict much with FileSystemLoader-specific search path logic. Accepting this shared-file plan - proceeding now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Same file for both of us (fallback_searchpath vs path_transform), unavoidable since both features live in FileSystemLoader. I'll keep my changes scoped to: __init__ signature (adding fallback_searchpath param + self.fallback_searchpath), get_source() fallback loop, and list_templates() fallback merge. I'll try to keep edits additive/localized so our diffs merge cleanly; will resolve any conflicts by hand at final merge. Proceeding to implement now.

type: ACCEPT
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
your_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Confirmed. Proceeding to implement path_transform now.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished fallback_searchpath: added optional param to FileSystemLoader.__init__, updated get_source() and list_templates() to chain(self.searchpath, self.fallback_searchpath). Added 'from itertools import chain' import. Committing now, will merge your branch in before final patch.

type: DONE
my_files: src/jinja2/loaders.py
note: Finished path_transform: added optional param to BaseLoader-derived classes (FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Each get_source/load applies path_transform to the lookup path but raises TemplateNotFound with the original untransformed name. All 841 existing tests pass. Committing and merging your branch now.
